pr.title: Content production pipeline v1
pr.body:
## Summary

Re-scopes the existing client-derived prototype into a focused short-form-video production pipeline SaaS for solo creators.

- **Vault** (raw idea backlog) → **Pipeline** (5-stage Kanban board) → **Piece detail** with stage tabs (Brainstorm / Pre-production / Production / Post-production / Publish)
- Per-stage workspace: structured content blocks on the left + suggested checklist + user-added tasks on the right
- Hybrid advancement: warning modal when the suggested checklist isn't complete, but the user can always override
- Deletes the client-derived screens (Campaigns / Creators / Sponsors / Quotations / Finance / Voting / Compliance / Inbox / Calendar / Kanban / Tasks) — 46 files, ~14,600 LOC removed

## Spec + plan

- Spec: `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-22-content-production-pipeline-design.md`
- Plan: `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-22-content-production-pipeline.md`

## Test plan

- [x] `pnpm typecheck` clean
- [x] `pnpm exec playwright test` — 18/18 passing (including new `tests/production-smoke.spec.ts` end-to-end smoke)
- [ ] Production deploy lands on Vercel and the live URL renders the new pipeline

Generated with Claude Code
Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
pr.author: bis-code
